improvements: Explicitly state whether yankees-roster is the container name or a virtual folder prefix to avoid double-prefix path bugs.
Require at least one test assertion on the exact blob name passed to get_blob_client when container is fixed.
Require acceptance-criteria mapping tests to include both final blob URI and logical blob key assertions.
When specifying blob paths in requirements, clarify examples as '<container>/<blob-name>' versus '<blob-name>' to avoid ambiguity.
